src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.general_idea: Add a new controller endpoint to retrieve articles filtered by location fields (country and city).
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.human_impl: @GetMapping public List<ArticleDto> getArticleByLocation(@RequestParam(required = false) String country, @RequestParam(required = false) String city)

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/co.general_idea: Remove the deprecated `readArticles` method that was marked for deletion.
Change the mapping path of the paged articles endpoint from root to '/all' to avoid conflicts or ambiguity.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/dt.general_idea: Replace the generic String representation of JSON data with a dedicated LocationDto object to improve type safety and structure.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/dt.human_impl: Changed field type from 'String jsonData' to 'LocationDto location' and updated the ApiModelProperty note.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/pe.general_idea: Extend the repository interface with a custom interface to support complex queries not natively supported by Spring Data.
Add a new method to retrieve articles filtered by country and city using Spring Data's method name derivation.
Replace String representation of JSON data with a dedicated Location entity class for type safety.
Remove explicit column name and redundant column definition from JPA annotation to rely on defaults or existing configuration.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/se.general_idea: Add a new method to the service interface to support searching articles by location fields.
Import java.util.List to support the return type of the new method.
Implement the getArticleByLocation method to support searching articles by country and city fields in a JSONB column.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/se.human_impl: Added getArticleByLocation method calling articleRepository.getArticleByCountryNCity and mapping results to DTOs.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/se.general_idea: Add import for java.util.List to support the return type of the new method.

src/test/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/In.general_idea: Upgrade the PostgreSQL Docker image used in integration tests from version 9.6 to 15.2-alpine to align with modern database standards and JDK 17 compatibility.

src/test/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/Sp.general_idea: Update test to use a dedicated DTO object instead of a raw JSON string for the location field.
Adjust assertion to verify the new DTO object field instead of the old JSON string field.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot starter parent to a version compatible with JDK 17.
Update the Java source and target version property to 17.
Upgrade MapStruct to a version that supports JDK 17.
Upgrade Lombok to a version that supports JDK 17.
Upgrade Testcontainers PostgreSQL dependency to a newer version.
Reorder annotation processor paths to ensure Lombok runs before MapStruct.
pom.xml.human_impl: Moved lombok path before mapstruct-processor path

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JaCoCo Maven plugin for code coverage reporting.
pom.xml.human_impl: Added jacoco-maven-plugin with prepare-agent and report goals

.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 17 instead of JDK 9 to align with the project's migration target.
.github/workflows/maven.yml.human_impl: Changed 'Set up JDK 1.9' to 'Set up JDK 17' and updated 'java-version: 9' to 'java-version: 17'.

.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Integrate a step to automatically generate and commit JaCoCo coverage badges to the repository.
.github/workflows/maven.yml.human_impl: Added 'Generate JaCoCo Badge' step using cicirello/jacoco-badge-generator@v2 and a commit step to push changes.

.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Upload the generated JaCoCo coverage report as a build artifact for inspection.
.github/workflows/maven.yml.human_impl: Added 'Upload JaCoCo coverage report' step using actions/upload-artifact@v2 targeting target/site/jacoco/.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add the logs directory to .gitignore to prevent log files from being committed to version control.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the Docker base image from OpenJDK 15 to OpenJDK 17 to align with the target JDK version.
Change the exposed container port from 8099 to 9080 to match the application's new configuration.
